text.message: welp, let's see what happens i guess...
did they like change the colora
of is my laptop just weird
we gotta work together now to stifle blue
its getting a bit out of hand
when we have aqueduct, maybe, but its slow
red you need to make a move on 9/4/11 before green secures it
i can 4-1 brick, anyone want something better?
i hit ya all game for the table talk and plow
you're not the rob anymore if that's any consolation
you still have a solid game
you can win if you play it right. its far from over.
don't give the game to green out of spite. You can win it still
you're the target. whoever wins, wins
you have knight points, 2 cities, metros and such
with table talk and unnecessary plow that even hurts you're own prod
you put up cities to try to sack our early game. dirty game play gets dirty game play
i put up a city because that was my hand
i settled brick port because that was my hand
and didn't want to discard half of it on a 7
plow was totally unneccesary and hurt your own game
you have knight points and uncontested blue metro
i think you win with brick port handedly
brick port and a 9 like 10 times worse than aqueduct
like, trade you wood and stuff
not interested in working with ya
its a game my man. don't take it so personally. nothing but love here
red you see blue is winning ya
glad this knight is in my 6
Imagine if I hadn't plowed him
